candidate_definition_hints.text: Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.
Pax is a framework to configure and run machine learning experiments on top of Jax.

candidate_glosses.text: Pax is a framework to configure and run machine learning experiments on top of Jax.
